response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and software architecture skills, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His experience heavily leans toward TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and SaaS environments, lacking the deep, low-level cloud compute infrastructure and C++ focus required for this specific Technical Lead role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software design, architecture, and building distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong background in engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and developing open-source testing frameworks.
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring capabilities through Staff-level roles, public speaking, and workshop creation.
concerns: Severely lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only brief professional exposure.
Domain expertise is centered around web applications, GIS, and SaaS rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure or hardware architecture.
Lacks explicit experience leading and mentoring dedicated cloud or DevOps engineering teams at scale.
